rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the user to choose whether they are a seller or a customer.
The system shall enable the seller to add or remove products from their list and finalize their offerings.
The system shall allow the customer to view available products and select ones of interest.
The system shall facilitate communication between customers and sellers for deal discussions.
The system shall determine whether a purchase is completed based on the discussion or if it does not proceed.
The system shall allow the customer to make payment after a purchase is completed and provide feedback later.
The system shall end the interaction if no deal occurs.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to choose between being a seller or a customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person starts by choosing whether they are a seller or a customer and then logs in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user is a seller, the system enables them to add or remove products from their list and finalize what they want to offer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are a seller, they can add or remove products from their list and finalize what they want to offer.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user is a customer, the system allows them to view available products and choose one they are interested in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are a customer, they can view available products and choose one they are interested in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system facilitates communication between customers and sellers to discuss deals.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the customer and seller communicate to discuss the deal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Based on the discussion, either a purchase is completed or it does not go ahead.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Based on the discussion, either the purchase is completed or it does not go ahead.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a purchase is completed, the system allows the customer to make payment and provide feedback on the product later.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the purchase is completed, the customer makes the payment and can later give feedback on the product.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If no deal happens, the interaction ends there.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the deal does not happen, it ends there.
